description: Create a content slide on the AI capabilities timeline with a horizontal process-flow/timeline in a sidebar-left layout, showing milestone tasks expected to reach human-level performance and a takeaway at the bottom.

header.headline: The progression of AI capabilities is expected to be near limitless – Intelligent machines will accomplish more and more ambitious tasks
header.sub: Timeline of artificial intelligence (AI) achieving human performance with a probability of 50%

steps.label: Telephone banking operator
steps.sub: Provide phone banking services as well as human operators can – without annoying customers more than humans

steps.label: Answer questions without definite answers
steps.sub: Give good answers in natural language to factual questions posed in natural language for which there are no definite correct answers

steps.label: Generate top 40 pop song
steps.sub: Compose a song that is good enough to reach the US Top 40. The system should output the complete song as an audio file

steps.label: Write New York Times bestseller
steps.sub: Write a novel or short story good enough to make it to the New York Times bestseller list

steps.label: One-shot learning
steps.sub: See only one labeled image of a new object, and then be able to recognize the object in real world scenes, to the extent that a typical human can

steps.label: Write a high school essay
steps.sub: Write an essay for a high school history class that would receive high grades and pass plagiarism detectors

steps.label: 5 km race in city
steps.sub: Beat the fastest human runners in a 5 kilometer race through city streets using a bipedal robot body

steps.label: Go (same training as human)
steps.sub: Defeat the best Go players, training only on as many games as the best Go players have played

footer.source: 1) Timeline based on probability estimates for AI achieving human performance across selected tasks
